title: Cleaning Product Donation Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Cleaning Product Donation Programs 10 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ALLEN TEMPLE EMERGENCY AIDE CENTER EMERGENCY AIDE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides pre-made food boxes and clothing assistance. Accepts donations of peanut butter, toilet paper, paper towels, and socks. 4214 NE 8th Avenue Portland, OR 97211 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Wednesday/Saturday 11am-2pm. Closed first week of every month. (503) 284-1010 Get Directions More Details FOOD FOR FAMILIES DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of shelf stable food items such as oils, flour, canned proteins, spices, and shelf stable milk. Also accepts donations of diapers, dog and cat food, personal and feminine hygiene products, canvas grocery bags, quart and gallon resealable plastic bags, disposable gloves, and produce bags. 3505 SE 182nd Avenue Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (971) 220-6679 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FURNISH HOPE DONATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accept donations of new or gently used household items, including kitchen basics such as dishes, glassware, bakeware, small appliances, utensils, pots, pans, home furniture, bedding, and cleaning supplies. 1006 SE 9th Street Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Drop off: Monday-Saturday 9am-11am Pick up: Varies (541) 638-0657 Get Directions Visit Website More Details IMPACT NW IMPACT NW DANCING TREE RESOURCE CENTER WORKER OF THE DAY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides help navigating resources in the community, information about coordinated access, and information and referral services. Assists on a first-come, first-serve basis with resource information and referral. Supplies fluctuate, but when available may provide Trimet day passes, hygiene items, water/snacks, and clothing. Referrals given for services or items of need that are not accessible through the agency. Donations of unisex clothing and household item are accepted. 10055 E Burnside Street Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Office: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Donations: Monday-Thursday 9am-4pm Email (503) 721-1740 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY GAP RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides furniture, kitchen items, firewood, medical equipment, personal hygiene supplies, cleaning supplies, and bedding/linens. Accepts donations of similar items. Assistance depends on availability. Follow-ups may be provided once the need is met. Eligibility: Low-income households (self-declared or referred and verified by caseworker, employer, or landlord) Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-1pm Email (503) 650-0153 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MY FATHER'S HOUSE MY FATHER'S HOUSE DONATION CENTER DONATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of food, cleaning supplies, paper products, diapers, office supplies, wrapping paper, bus tickets, grocery gift cards, and new toys. 5003 W Powell Boulevard Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Saturday 9am-1pm (503) 492-3046 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OUR JUST FUTURE DONATIONS AND VOLUNTEERING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of food, personal hygiene products, household cleaning products, diapers, formula, baby powder, wipes, underwear, bras, socks, sleepwear, and cold weather gear. Also offers volunteer opportunities. 10550 NE Halsey Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies Email (971) 610-1827 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RAPHAEL HOUSE OF PORTLAND RAPHAEL HOUSE OF PORTLAND DONATION DROP OFF DONATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of new, unopened, and full-size personal hygiene products such as shampoo, conditioner, and body wash. Also accepts toothpaste and toothbrushes, baby hygiene products, natural household cleaning products, high-efficiency laundry detergent, new pillows, new socks and undergarments (for adults and children), twin sheets and blankets, and kitchenware. Does not accept travel-size toiletries, used clothing or shoes, used toys, furniture, cell phones, or any item not in good, clean, working condition. 6161 SE Stark Street Portland, OR 97215 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 1st Thursday of the month 11am-1pm, 3rd Thursday of the month 4pm-6pm Email (503) 243-5159 - Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVENTH DAY ADVENTIST KLAMATH FALLS COMMUNITY SERVICES OUTREACH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a community meal and distributes personal hygiene items and household cleaning products. Personal hygiene items include toothpaste, toothbrushes, shampoo, deodorant, razors, toilet paper, sanitary napkins, and baby wipes. Cleaning products include laundry soap, dish soap, and household cleaners. Also accepts donations. 1735 Main Street Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday 5:30pm-6:30pm Email (541) 882-2466 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TERESA MCCORMICK CENTER CLOTHING CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing, shoes, bedding, personal hygiene products, and cleaning supplies. Offers a bicycle program for individuals with no other means of transportation when bikes are in stock. Also accepts donations. 2600 S Pacific Highway Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday 2pm-4:30pm, Thursday 10am-1pm Email (541) 864-5098 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ALLEN TEMPLE EMERGENCY AIDE CENTER EMERGENCY AIDE CENTER FOOD FOR FAMILIES DONATIONS FURNISH HOPE DONATION CENTER IMPACT NW WORKER OF THE DAY MY FATHER'S HOUSE DONATION CENTER OUR JUST FUTURE DONATIONS AND VOLUNTEERING RAPHAEL HOUSE OF PORTLAND DONATION PROGRAM SEVENTH DAY ADVENTIST KLAMATH FALLS COMMUNITY SERVICES OUTREACH TERESA MCCORMICK CENTER CLOTHING CLOSET
